text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, Bakushin, Bakushiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Bakushin O is in the lead, leaving the other runners in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Graaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Finish! Sakura Bakushin O is your new Sprinters Stakes champion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chirp, chirp...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to head to the training course. Despite it still being early
morning, I spot Sakura Bakushin O there, hard at work.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Uraaagh! Bakushin, Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sit there, stunned. She's going even faster than she was in my dream!
If only she'd agree to be a sprinter...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I continue to watch her run, saddened by the fact that she's so
hell-bent on running in races ill-suited to her talents.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Phew! That's today's goals reached! Leave it to the class representative to get stuff done!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Sakura Bakushin O! I want to make you the top sprinter in
the world! How does that sound?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your interest, but I'm sorry! I must decline!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: After all, I have to set a good example as class representative!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O remains as stubborn as always. As a trainer, I want
to respect her decision, but it's easier said than done...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that conundrum on my mind, I go about my day. As the sun sets,
I take one last trip to the training course.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let me guess, Rice! You want me, the class representative, to give
you running tips, right?! You're looking to me for guidance, RIGHT?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-all I said was that you're fast...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to be shy! As your class representative, it is my duty
to help any and all students in need!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but, um... If you're around me for too long, I'll just bring you
misfortune...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Does... that mean you... don't want my help?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I-I see... W-well, as your class representative, I'm disappointed, but...
I s-suppose I must soldier on...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Do you reeeally not need my help? That's too bad...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah, um... Um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: C-could you tell me... some tips on winning?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: An EXCELLENT question, my dear Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now, allow me to impart to you the true secret to winning! And that
is... speed!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-speed?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Riddle me this, Rice... What do you need to do in order to win the
race?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Reach the finish line before anyone else, right?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-right...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So in other words, in order to be the strongest, you have to be the
fastest! Not just at the beginning or end of the race, but at all times!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Such overwhelming speed is the true key to victory!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My brow furrows. What she says may seem simpleminded at a glance,
but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Clearly, that fixation on speed has made Sakura Bakushin O the
powerful runner she is today.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Phew... No better way to end the day than being a helpful class
representative! It feels good to be so reliable!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Whoa! When did you get here?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hm? Um... Hello? Why are you staring at me like that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overwhelming speed is the key to victory. Just how far can that
ideology take her...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, Bakushin, Bakushiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Bakushin O is in the lead, leaving the other runners in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Graaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surely it could take her farther than that! My mind begins to race as I
consider all the possibilities...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yoo-hoo! Earth to Trainer! Is there something you need from me?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All you trainers have been bugging me since yesterday. It's always
"give up on marathons" this and "but your talents" that!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: So let me make this clear, I'm not interested!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
Let's make you the fastest Umamusume in the
world!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Th-the fastest?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wait, we're talking about taking on every single race—every single
obstacle, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Me, the class representative, running in EVERY SINGLE RACE, RIGHT?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIIIN! At last, the trainer I've been waiting for!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You've got yourself a deal! Starting tomorrow, I'll be in your capable
hands!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, my journey with Bakushin O begins.
